reason: Frontend quality check commands for Svelte shell changes.
UI, daisyUI, API helper, and responsive layout conventions to verify against.

notes: No whitespace errors; Git reported existing CRLF normalization warnings only.

Temporary Vite + mock API. Desktop 1280px sidebar collapsed from 288px to 80px, menu labels hid, panels floated at x=96 with widths 320/384px. Mobile 390px drawer stayed 288px with labels/profile visible and collapse button hidden.

Fixed discoverability issue: expanded sidebar now shows visible Toggle Sidebar text and uses a stable aria-label. Browser check at 1280px found one Toggle Sidebar button; expanded width 288px with visible text, collapsed width 80px, same button expanded back to 288px.

Refined toggle to icon-only visual treatment while keeping aria-label/title as Toggle Sidebar. Browser check at 1280px found empty visible text, 40px icon button, and about 21px gap from sidebar right edge in both expanded and collapsed states.
